name: Credit for Wine and Flavors Content

eligibility.description: Distilled spirits producers or importers whose products contain wine or eligible flavors (up to 2.5% of finished product for flavors).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a credit against distilled spirits excise tax for the wine and flavors content of a distilled spirits product, effectively reducing the tax rate on those components.
